error: The sandbox was not found: This error is likely due to sandbox timeout. You can modify the sandbox timeout by passing 'timeout' when starting the sandbox or calling '.set_timeout' on the sandbox with the desired timeout.

p2p_enrich.notes: Dockerfile has bug: 'yarn workspace @excalidraw/math build' should be 'build:esm'. Added 4 pass_to_pass tests: test_repo_typecheck (tsc), test_repo_lint (eslint), test_repo_prettier (prettier --list-different), test_repo_math_tests (vitest packages/math). All CI commands verified working on base commit dfdd994d.

validate.notes: Fixed: 1) Dockerfile build command (build -> build:esm), 2) Added python3-pytest to Dockerfile, 3) Fixed test.sh paths and reward calculation, 4) Fixed solve.sh patch application using Python, 5) Updated test_outputs.py to remove tsx-based tests (module resolution issues), 6) Updated eval_manifest.yaml to match new test structure
